zh.Tideswell, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾迪德斯維爾
zh.Chancel of Tidewell Chruch,Tideswell, De: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾迪德斯維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Foljambe於大約1179年出生在英國德比夏爾迪德斯維爾時，他的父親Henry Foljambe Lord of Tideswell29歲，母親Eleanor FitzHerbert30歲。他和Margaret Luttrell至少有6個兒子。他去世於大約1249年在他的家鄉享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾迪德斯維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Foljambe于大约1179年出生在英国德比夏爾迪德斯維爾时，他的父亲Henry Foljambe Lord of Tideswell29岁，母亲Eleanor FitzHerbert30岁。他和Margaret Luttrell至少有6个儿子。他去世于大约1249年在他的家乡享年72岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾迪德斯維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Foljambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French fol ‘foolish, silly’ + jambe ‘leg’, probably a nickname for a lame person, someone with a maimed or crooked leg; compare Belgian . In Old French fol could be used of something useless or of little value, e.g. farine folle ‘mill dust’.

variants.name: Fulljames
meanings: English: variant of Foljambe with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belgian
meanings: Norman, English, Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French bele jambe ‘fine leg’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When John Foljambe was born about 1179, in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, his father, Henry Foljambe Lord of Tideswell, was 29 and his mother, Eleanor FitzHerbert, was 30. He had at least 6 sons with Margaret Luttrell. He died about 1249, in his hometown, at the age of 72, and was buried in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Foljambe est né environ 1179, à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Foljambe Lord of Tideswell, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Eleanor FitzHerbert, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Margaret Luttrell. Il est décédé environ 1249, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Foljambe um 1179 in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Foljambe Lord of Tideswell 29 und seine Mutter Eleanor FitzHerbert 30. Er hatte mit Margaret Luttrell mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb um 1249 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Foljambe è nato il circa 1179 nel Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Foljambe Lord of Tideswell, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor FitzHerbert, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Margaret Luttrell. Morì circa 1249, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Foljambeが約1179年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルで生まれた時，父Henry Foljambe Lord of Tideswellは29歳，母Eleanor FitzHerbertは30歳であった。彼はMargaret Luttrellとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1249年に故郷で72歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Foljambe(이)가 대략 1179년 영국 더비실르 티데스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Foljambe Lord of Tideswell(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor FitzHerbert(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Margaret Luttrell(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1249년 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 티데스웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Foljambe nasceu aproximadamente 1179, em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Foljambe Lord of Tideswell, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor FitzHerbert, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Margaret Luttrell. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1249, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Foljambe родился около 1179 г. в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Foljambe Lord of Tideswell было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor FitzHerbert, 30. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Margaret Luttrell. Он умер около 1249 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1179–about 1249: e tusa o le 1179–e tusa o le 1249

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Foljambe nació aproximadamente 1179, en Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Foljambe Lord of Tideswell, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Eleanor FitzHerbert, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Margaret Luttrell. Murió aproximadamente 1249, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
